target: 4. Hero of Justice…?
(After parting ways with Mio Kofune and Tokiko Hishigata, where Hoine led me to was--)
We're heeeere! This is the Hero of Justice's secret base!
I wondered what it would be, but it's just the police box. An extremely open public servant facility with nothing secret about it...
Totsumura-saaan! Let's plaaay!
Hmmm... Who might you be?
Good work today, sir! I am Hoine Minakata!
Oh, if it isn't Hoine-chan! Welcome!
I have a report! The island is peaceful again today, sir!
Oho, that's good to hear. Good work on your patrol.
Hehe!

Hey, Hoine.
Is this guy the "Hero of Justice"?
Yeah! He's the Hero of Justice who protects the island's safety!
Hm? Hmmm!?
(...His gaze is blatantly directed at my chest. He's not even trying to hide it, what a scumbag.)
U-Um, Hoine-chan? W-Who is this person...?

Hizuru-chan!
She's Papa's older sister!
I'm guiding Hizuru-chan around the island right now!
Ah, Ryunosuke-kun's...
Ryunosuke Minakata's older sister, Hizuru Minakata.
…H-cup.
Huh?
Ah…
A-Ah, no no! I didn't say anything at all, y'know!? A-Ahahahaha!
...What a picture-perfect lowlife of a man.
I might be able to tolerate him in a story, but I've confirmed that he is extremely annoying in the real world.
If he were to face a real crisis, he'd be the first to turn tail and run-- That's the kind of man he is.
...Wh-Wha!?
But rest assured. A story cannot be established with brave warriors alone. Foolish humans like you are also necessary.
...Wh-Wh-Wha!?
Th-That's an insult! I'll arrest you!
And another thing! I'm a G-cup, not an H-cup!
Wh-Wh-Wh-Wh-What did you saaaaay!?
Hizuru-chan, what's a "G-cup"?
It is a unit for the size of the chest. You'll understand the details eventually, once you grow up.
Hmm, once I grow up, huh.
Hoine, that's enough of the Hero of Justice. Guide me to the next place.
Okaaaay! Bye-bye, Totsumura-san!
O-Oh...
Utterly ridiculous. To call himself a Hero of Justice like that, the world is truly ending.
But Totsumura-san plays with me a lot, you know?
Playing with children is not the job of a Hero of Justice. It is an extreme dereliction of duty.
But... the fact that he has that much free time means the island is just that peaceful.
Yeah! It's nice and peaceful today too!
…Yeah.
(What you can see isn't everything. Through my research up until now, I've come to realize that.)
(It's not uncommon for a seemingly idyllic farming village to actually be a microcosm of a strained surveillance society.)
(Things have a front and a back, and the existence of people is no exception to that.)
(However... This island truly seems like a safe place, just as it appears.)
(I thought it was just my bias of being from this island that made me feel that way, but...)
(The fact that Totsumura can serve as the island's resident officer--)
(I suppose you could say that fact speaks volumes about just how peaceful this island is.)
Hey, Hizuru-chan!
What?
Don't just space out here, let's hurry to the next place! There are still so many places I want to show you!
Yeah...
(I wasn't just spacing out, though. I suppose children don't have the time to indulge in contemplation.)
C'mon, this way, this way~!
Okay, okay.
